decision.speech:
Logical ruling and elimination procedures:
1. Abnormal confirmation: There is a serious logical contradiction between Blaze's statement about identity changes at night and the Troublemaker's test results.
2. Implementation policy: Blaze’s high-frequency emotional attacks and false information output have destroyed the game information chain.

Voting Execution: I vote for Blaze.

Ugh...Blaze, you...uh...why do you have to talk about everything so intensely? I think everyone is so confused... Well... Since PHD has found out that there is something wrong with you, I... I'm really afraid of another conflict, I... I can only vote for you, Blaze, I'm sorry, woo hoo...

Uh... uh... Blaze, your... uh... way of accusing people is really too fierce... uh... everyone is so confused, but since PHD has found out that there is something wrong with you, I... I can only vote for you, Blaze, I'm sorry, woo woo...

Ha ha! Look! This is simply "encirclement, suppression and cutting" at the textbook level! The voting rhythm of you extras is completely exposed! PHD, your so-called "logical cross-calibration" is simply worthless! You and Blaze are singing together, one is making accusations, and the other is taking a "calm inventory." I have already seen through this binary opposition! The more you try to clean up this "core variable" of mine, the more it proves that you group of extras have panicked! You are not reconciling the accounts at all, but are conspiring to destroy the data of this fictitious cage in an attempt to cover up the fact that you are the real controller of this game! No matter how you perform, I will not fall into the trap of this fictional prison script! My final vote, for Dr. Pizza!

Twister, you are a bad actor, you act mysterious and provoke fights all day long, but you still say that I am a werewolf? I, Blaze, am doing my best to show off your werewolf camp tricks! You are here to stir up troubles and talk illogical nonsense all day long. You are just creating chaos here! Don't let this actor do anything to you anymore. He'll surrender to Twister, and you'll be done with it!

Oops, Blaze, you finally can't help it anymore? I, Tang Jing, have never barked, I only break the news! Listen up, everyone: I checked last night and Blaze's trump card clearly said "Werewolf"! Do you want to divert your attention in some way? PHD, is this evidence enough for you to take inventory? What are you waiting for? Just throw this little werewolf to death, don't let him go crazy and mess up again, hahahaha!

Logical ruling and execution:
1. Evaluation of the validity of the evidence: Blaze’s statement about night operations is in direct conflict with Twister’s inspection results, and his narrative lacks verifiability.
2. Abnormal convergence: Blaze continues to release disturbing information, which has seriously hindered the identity reconciliation mechanism.

Voting Execution: I vote for Blaze.

Ugh... Blaze, you... uh... do you have to talk about something so intensely? I think everyone is so confused... Well... Since both PHD and Twister have said that they will exclude the most troublesome people, I... I can only vote for you, Blaze, I'm sorry, ugh...

Uh... uh... Blaze, your... uh... way of accusing people is really too fierce... uh... everyone is so confused, but since PHD and Twister both call you a TroubleMaker, and you are yelling here, I... I can only vote for you, Blaze, I'm sorry, woo...

This is simply "encirclement, suppression and cutting" at the textbook level! Look, even SafetySam and EasyBake, who were saying "it's confusing when everyone accuses each other" just now, instantly unified their voices and voted for Blaze! Isn’t this the most obvious form of camp complicity? PHD, your program is really efficient, even these idiots can be instantly encoded into attack sequences by you! Are you trying to make this variable-clearing drama look like a "just collective decision" by throwing in an angry Blaze as a sacrifice? I will never let your fictional cage reset its data so easily! Now that you have chosen the scapegoat, I will follow this ridiculous script to the end and see what drama you can perform after the node of your imaginary cage is removed! My final vote, for Twister!

Twister, you are a bad actor, you act mysterious and cause fights all day long! What evidence do I have? I personally exchanged your friends and PHD last night. I, Blaze, can see the tricks of your werewolf camp at a glance! You are here to stir up troubles and talk illogical nonsense all day long. You are just creating chaos here! Don't let this actor do anything to you anymore. He'll surrender to Twister, and you'll be done with it!

Logical ruling and execution:
1. Abnormal confirmation: There are logical conflicts between Blaze's night operation statement (exchanging SafetySam and Dr. Pizza), its identity verification result (Troublemaker), and Twister's accusation path.
2. Implementation policy: Blaze’s narrative shows highly malicious interference characteristics, and it is listed as the primary elimination target according to the elimination sequence.

Voting Execution: I vote for Blaze.

Oops, Blaze, you are so impatient, you are always the first to rush out and bite someone in every game! Although Pizza is rigid, he at least has the logic to take stock, while you, Blaze, just know how to yell and kill people. Since everyone has to clear up the variables, I will follow the trend and send you the most anxious Blaze out. Let’s see if you are really innocent, hahahaha!

Ugh...Blaze, you...uh...why do you have to talk about everything so intensely? I think everyone is so confused... Well... Since both PHD and Twister have said that they will exclude the most troublesome people, I... I can only vote for you, Blaze, I'm sorry, ugh...
